title: [circt-verilog] Replace arith.select with comb.mux
body:
Add a small pass to the LLHD dialect to convert `arith.select` ops to `comb.mux` operations. (Also `arith.constant` to `hw.constant`.) The canonicalizers in the CF dialect produce `arith.select` operations, but we would like the circt-verilog pipeline to produce HW/Comb/Seq output where possible.

In the future we might want to create a full Arith-to-Comb conversion pass, similar to the Comb-to-Arith we already have. This feels like a bit of overkill to do just for the select ops, but we migth run into more of these ops at a later point.
